summary: Verified 3 critical UI bug fixes: (1) Dashboard Privacy notice now has bright blue bg (bg-blue-600), bold white text, and solid filled red shield SVG. (2) Dashboard Pipeline Portfolio Summary now has bright blue bg with bold white text and semi-transparent stat cards. (3) Code review confirms GroundsOfMerit.jsx and LegitimacyPanel.jsx fixes for supporting_evidence object rendering and mobile grid layout (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3). Note: Test case case_87ef925be713 returns 404 - unable to directly test Grounds of Merit page with live data.

minor.issue: Test case case_87ef925be713 returns 404 - case may have been deleted or belongs to different user

VERIFIED FIX: EvidenceSummary.jsx lines 13-14 - properly handles objects with item?.quote || item?.text || 'Evidence item'
